plugin.name: Madrox_PluginManager
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.description:
Madrox Plugin Manager (mpm) - keeps Madrox's Aardwolf plugins up to date from the GitHub repo at https://github.com/AardMadrox/aardwolf-plugins
mpm - show the plugin list with install/update/reload buttons mpm update <n> - download and update plugin number <n> mpm install <n> - install plugin number <n> mpm reload <n> - reload plugin number <n> mpm remove <n> - remove (unload + delete) plugin number <n> mpm updateall - update every out-of-date plugin mpm check - re-read the list from GitHub mpm selfupdate - update this manager itself mpm debug - toggle debug messages mpm help - show this help
Download/reload mechanics adapted from Kelaire's Self_PluginManager (epic_plugin_manager), which credits Crowley's self-update code.

muclient.script:
local LIST_URL = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AardMadrox/aardwolf-plugins/main/plugins.list" local SELF_RAW = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AardMadrox/aardwolf-plugins/main/Madrox_PluginManager.xml"
local cache = {} -- array of {url, file, name, ghver, id, localver, installed} local initialized = false local expected = 0 -- how many plugin files we are waiting on local received = 0 -- how many have come back local render_when_done = false local debug_on = false
local function dbg(msg) if debug_on then ColourNote("orange", "", "MPM debug: " .. tostring(msg)) end end
local function info(msg) ColourNote("yellow", "", "MPM: " .. tostring(msg)) end local function err(msg) ColourNote("white", "red", "MPM: " .. tostring(msg)) end
local function get_async() local ok, async = pcall(require, "async") if not ok then err("Could not load the 'async' library (it ships with the Aardwolf client package).") return nil end return async end
-- pull the plugin tag fields out of a downloaded .xml local function parse_field(page, field) -- field on its own line, e.g. version="1.0" return page:match('[\r\n]%s*' .. field .. '%s*=%s*"([^"]+)"') end
-- MUSHclient stores a plugin's version as a decimal NUMBER (so "1.10" == 1.1), -- and GetPluginInfo(id,19) hands it back numerically. To stay consistent with the -- installed side, compare versions as plain decimal numbers here too. Rule for -- version= numbers: keep the minor a single digit; after x.9 roll to (x+1).0. local function ver_num(v) return tonumber((tostring(v):gsub("[^%d%.]", ""))) or 0 end
-- true if version a is >= version b local function ver_ge(a, b) return ver_num(a) >= ver_num(b) end
local function file_from_url(url) return url:match("/([^/]+)$") or "unknown.xml" end
------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Building the list (asynchronous) -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function mpm_on_plugin(retval, page, status, headers, full_status, request_url) received = received + 1 if status == 200 and page then local entry = {} entry.url = request_url entry.file = file_from_url(request_url) entry.name = parse_field(page, "[Nn][Aa][Mm][Ee]") or entry.file:gsub("%.xml$", "") entry.ghver = parse_field(page, "[Vv][Ee][Rr][Ss][Ii][Oo][Nn]") or "0" entry.id = parse_field(page, "[Ii][Dd]") or "" entry.installed = entry.id ~= "" and IsPluginInstalled(entry.id) or false entry.localver = entry.installed and GetPluginInfo(entry.id, 19) or 0 table.insert(cache, entry) dbg(entry.name .. " gh=" .. entry.ghver .. " local=" .. tostring(entry.localver) .. " installed=" .. tostring(entry.installed)) else err("Could not fetch " .. file_from_url(request_url or "?") .. " (status " .. tostring(status) .. ")") end
if received >= expected then initialized = true -- sort by name so numbering is stable table.sort(cache, function(a, b) return a.name:lower() < b.name:lower() end) info("Plugin list ready (" .. #cache .. " plugins).") if render_when_done then render_when_done = false renderMenu() end end end
function mpm_on_list(retval, page, status, headers, full_status, request_url) if status ~= 200 or not page then err("Could not read the plugin list from GitHub (status " .. tostring(status) .. ").") return end local async = get_async() if not async then return end
cache = {} initialized = false received = 0 expected = 0
local urls = {} for line in (page .. "\n"):gmatch("(.-)\r?\n") do line = line:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") if line ~= "" and not line:match("^#") then table.insert(urls, line) end end expected = #urls dbg("list has " .. expected .. " entries") if expected == 0 then err("The plugin list was empty.") return end for _, u in ipairs(urls) do async.doAsyncRemoteRequest(u, mpm_on_plugin, "HTTPS") end end
function buildCache(render) render_when_done = render and true or false local async = get_async() if not async then return end info("Reading plugin list from GitHub...") async.doAsyncRemoteRequest(LIST_URL, mpm_on_list, "HTTPS") end
------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- The menu -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function renderMenu() if not initialized then buildCache(true) return end ColourNote("white", "slateblue", " [ Madrox Plugin Manager ] ") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Click a plugin name for info, or a button to act.") for i, e in ipairs(cache) do local up_to_date = ver_ge(e.localver, e.ghver) if e.installed then if up_to_date then ColourTell("cyan", "", " [", "green", "", "x", "cyan", "", "] ") else ColourTell("cyan", "", " [", "yellow", "", "!", "cyan", "", "] ") end else ColourTell("cyan", "", " [ ] ") end
Hyperlink("mpm info " .. i, string.format("%2d. %-20s", i, e.name), "Plugin info", "skyblue", "black", 0, 1) ColourTell("white", "", "v" .. tostring(e.ghver) .. " ")
if not e.installed then Hyperlink("mpm install " .. i, "[Install]", "Install this plugin", "darkorange", "black", 0, 1) elseif not up_to_date then Hyperlink("mpm update " .. i, "[Update]", "Download and update", "darkorange", "black", 0, 1) Hyperlink("mpm remove " .. i, "[Remove]", "Unload and delete", "red", "black", 0, 1) else Hyperlink("mpm reload " .. i, "[Reload]", "Reload this plugin", "teal", "black", 0, 1) Hyperlink("mpm remove " .. i, "[Remove]", "Unload and delete", "red", "black", 0, 1) end ColourNote("white", "", "") end ColourNote("cyan", "", "[x]=up to date [!]=update available [ ]=not installed") end
------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Actions -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- download a url synchronously, returns page, status local function download(url) local async = get_async() if not async then return nil, 0 end local thread = async.request(url, "HTTPS") local retval, page, status = thread:join() return page, status end
local function get_entry(n) n = tonumber(n) if not n or not cache[n] then err("No plugin number " .. tostring(n) .. ". Type 'mpm' to see the list.") return nil end return cache[n], n end
function cmdInstall(n) local e = get_entry(n); if not e then return end if e.id ~= "" and IsPluginInstalled(e.id) then info(e.name .. " is already installed. Use 'mpm reload' or 'mpm update'.") return end info("Installing " .. e.name .. " ...") local page, status = download(e.url) if status ~= 200 or not page then err("Download failed (status " .. tostring(status) .. ").") return end local path = GetInfo(60) .. e.file local f = io.open(path, "w"); f:write(page); f:close() LoadPlugin(path) info(e.name .. " installed.") buildCache(false) end
function cmdUpdate(n) local e = get_entry(n); if not e then return end if not (e.id ~= "" and IsPluginInstalled(e.id)) then info(e.name .. " is not installed. Use 'mpm install " .. tostring(n) .. "'.") return end if ver_ge(e.localver, e.ghver) then info(e.name .. " is already up to date (v" .. tostring(e.localver) .. ").") return end info("Updating " .. e.name .. " to v" .. tostring(e.ghver) .. " ...") local page, status = download(e.url) if status ~= 200 or not page then err("Download failed (status " .. tostring(status) .. ").") return end local path = GetPluginInfo(e.id, 6) UnloadPlugin(e.id) local f = io.open(path, "w"); f:write(page); f:close() LoadPlugin(path) info(e.name .. " updated.") buildCache(false) end
function cmdReload(n) local e = get_entry(n); if not e then return end if e.id ~= "" and IsPluginInstalled(e.id) then info("Reloading " .. e.name .. " ...") ReloadPlugin(e.id) else info(e.name .. " is not installed. Use 'mpm install " .. tostring(n) .. "'.") end end
function cmdRemove(n) local e = get_entry(n); if not e then return end if not (e.id ~= "" and IsPluginInstalled(e.id)) then info(e.name .. " is not installed.") return end local path = GetPluginInfo(e.id, 6) UnloadPlugin(e.id) local ok, rerr = os.remove(path) if ok then info("Removed " .. e.name .. ".") else err("Could not delete file: " .. tostring(rerr)) end buildCache(false) end
function cmdUpdateAll() if not initialized then info("List not ready yet - run 'mpm' first.") return end local any = false for i, e in ipairs(cache) do if e.id ~= "" and IsPluginInstalled(e.id) and not ver_ge(e.localver, e.ghver) then any = true cmdUpdate(i) end end if not any then info("Everything is already up to date.") end end
------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Self update (adapted from Crowley via Kelaire) -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function mpm_self_check(retval, page, status, headers, full_status, request_url) if status ~= 200 or not page then err("Self-update check failed (status " .. tostring(status) .. ").") return end local raw_version = parse_field(page, "[Vv][Ee][Rr][Ss][Ii][Oo][Nn]") or "0" local mine = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) if ver_ge(mine, raw_version) then info("Madrox Plugin Manager is up to date (v" .. tostring(mine) .. ").") return end info("Updating manager from v" .. tostring(mine) .. " to v" .. tostring(raw_version) .. " ...") local f = io.open(GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 6), "w"); f:write(page); f:close() if "" == GetAlphaOption("script_prefix") then SetAlphaOption("script_prefix", "\\\\\\") end Execute(GetAlphaOption("script_prefix") .. "DoAfterSpecial(1, \"ReloadPlugin('" .. GetPluginID() .. "')\", sendto.script)") info("Manager updated - reloading.") end
function cmdSelfUpdate() local async = get_async(); if not async then return end info("Checking for a manager update ...") async.doAsyncRemoteRequest(SELF_RAW, mpm_self_check, "HTTPS") end
------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Help + command dispatch -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function showInfo(n) local e = get_entry(n); if not e then return end ColourNote("white", "slateblue", e.name) ColourNote("cyan", "", " GitHub version: v" .. tostring(e.ghver)) ColourNote("cyan", "", " Installed: " .. (e.installed and ("v" .. tostring(e.localver)) or "no")) ColourNote("cyan", "", " File: " .. e.file) end
function showHelp() ColourNote("white", "slateblue", " Madrox Plugin Manager - help ") local lines = { "mpm - re-read from GitHub and show the plugin list", "mpm list - show the list without re-reading GitHub", "mpm update <n> - update plugin number <n>", "mpm install <n> - install plugin number <n>", "mpm reload <n> - reload plugin number <n>", "mpm remove <n> - unload and delete plugin <n>", "mpm updateall - update everything out of date", "mpm check - re-read the list from GitHub", "mpm selfupdate - update this manager", "mpm debug - toggle debug messages", "mpm help - this help", } for _, l in ipairs(lines) do ColourNote("cyan", "", " " .. l) end end
function mpmMain(name, line, wc) local first, rest = (wc[1] or ""):match("(%S*)%s*(.*)") -- plain "mpm" always re-reads from GitHub so versions are live; "mpm list" shows the cached view if first == nil or first == "" then buildCache(true); return end first = first:lower()
if first == "help" then showHelp() elseif first == "check" then buildCache(true) elseif first == "list" then renderMenu() elseif first == "info" then showInfo(rest) elseif first == "install" then cmdInstall(rest) elseif first == "update" then cmdUpdate(rest) elseif first == "updateall" then cmdUpdateAll() elseif first == "reload" then cmdReload(rest) elseif first == "remove" then cmdRemove(rest) elseif first == "selfupdate" then cmdSelfUpdate() elseif first == "debug" then debug_on = not debug_on info("debug " .. (debug_on and "ON" or "OFF")) else err("Unknown command '" .. first .. "'. Type 'mpm help'.") end end
function OnPluginInstall() ColourNote("white", "slateblue", "Madrox Plugin Manager loaded. Type 'mpm' for the plugin list.") buildCache(false) end
function OnPluginEnable() if not initialized then buildCache(false) end end
